name: Test Dummy
description: Returns fake data after a short delay — for testing the execution pipeline
usage_notes: Development/testing only. Generates fake data to verify pipeline execution without hitting real websites. Set fail_entity to test error handling.

options.name: delay_ms
options.label: Delay per entity (ms)
options.description: How long to wait per entity to simulate work.

options.name: items_per_entity
options.label: Items per entity
options.description: How many fake items to generate per entity.

options.name: fail_entity
options.label: Fail on entity name
options.description: If an entity name matches this string, simulate a failure. Leave empty to succeed all.
